title: How does music set the mood in a store? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: "Setting the mood" is a precise mechanism: music drives pleasure and arousal, those emotions drive spending, and emotional fit with the space can lift purchase intent. Here's how the psychology works.

schema.headline: How does music set the mood in a store?
schema.description: The pleasure-arousal mechanism behind store atmosphere, and how emotional fit between music and space affects spending.
